flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at University of Wisconsin-Whitewater rose 13% between 2021 and 2024 ($16.6k → $18.7k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at University of Wisconsin-Whitewater rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($7.7k → $8.6k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at University of Wisconsin-Whitewater fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.0% → 0.0%).
